instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered commit `d97f230` (“Move to Stanford”) from the reflog and merged it into `master`.

- Created safety branch: `recovered-move-to-stanford`
- Resolved biography conflict using the newer Stanford text
- Merge commit: `f09811f`
- Working tree is clean; no conflict markers remain.

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- recent reflog --
' && git reflog --date=iso -20 && printf '
-- graph --
' && git log --all --oneline --decorate --graph -20

git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- recent reflog --
' && git reflog --date=iso -30 && printf '
-- graph --
' && git log --all --oneline --decorate --graph -30

git show --stat --oneline --decorate d97f230 && printf '
-- ancestry --
' && git merge-base master d97f230 && git log --left-right --oneline master...d97f230 && printf '
-- diff --
' && git diff --stat master d97f230

printf '%s
' '-- conflict file --' && cat _includes/about.md && printf '%s
' '-- base --' && git show :1:_includes/about.md && printf '%s
' '-- master --' && git show :2:_includes/about.md && printf '%s
' '-- recover
